title: Open Calls for Papers, Proposals, and Applications
text:
Open Calls for Papers, Proposals, and Applications

Calls close at 11:59 pm ET on the date specified.

Calls for PapersEconomics of Talent Conference (call closes July 6, 2026)Service Delivery by State and Local Governments (call closes July 15, 2026)Emerging Challenges in Long-Term Care and Caregiving (call closes July 31, 2026)Health Care Administration and Fraud (call closes July 31, 2026)Firms, Technology, and Economic Implications (call closes August 4, 2026) Macroeconomic Effects of Population Aging (call closes August 5, 2026) Economic Measurement in the Agricultural Economy (call closes August 18, 2026) Economic Analysis of Business Taxation call closes August 26, 2026) Long-Term Budget Deficits: Economic Effects and Potential Responses (call closes August 31, 2026) Economics of Religion (call closes September 1, 2026)Emerging Markets: Navigating a Fragmented Global Economy (call closes September 8, 2026)Production Function Estimation and Its Applications to Industries (call closes September 14, 2026)Demographic Forces and US Labor Market Dynamics (call closes December 1, 2026)Tariffs and Economic Performance (call closes December 16, 2026)Spatial Spillovers from Transport Infrastructure Investments (call closes January 14, 2027)Calls for ProposalsGrants to Support Data for Economic Measurement Projects (call closes July 31, 2026)Fellowship Announcements Sign-up (and Unsubscribe)
